title: @emit — live demo
description: Staff-only verbatim room broadcast with no speaker prefix.

steps.note: Pose and say always attach the speaker's name. @emit drops the message into the room verbatim — the right tool for ambient narration, weather, off-screen action, or scene-setting beats. Restricted to staff because it is, by design, an unattributed voice.
A regular player attempting @emit gets a flat permission refusal — no message reaches the room.
Because @emit is verbatim, MUSH colour codes in the message render as expected — handy for evocative scene beats.

steps.cmd: @emit %ch%crA cold wind blows through the room.%cn

steps.expect: A cold wind blows through the room.
